notes_on_model_string: Pentagon uses 'claude-opus-4-8[1m]' (with [1m] suffix for 1M-context variant) for its pentagon.defaultModel preference, but the per-agent model column uses 'claude-opus-4-8' (no suffix). Verifier checks these as two separate fields.
rationale: Migrated 2026-05-28 to Opus 4.8 per operator request ('the model everywhere in my agents needs to be opus 4.8'). Opus 4.8 (claude-opus-4-8) is the latest, most capable model. Same provider/harness as the prior opus-4.7 cohort — only the model string changes, so the bridge runClaude() dispatch path is unaffected. Cohort sample sizes do NOT mix across this boundary: T6/T7 work measured on opus-4.7-claude-code-2026-05-27 stays pinned to that cohort; new gauntlet runs measure on opus-4.8-claude-code-2026-05-28.
scope: All active_graph Pentagon agents (originally 20, all 5 active + 15 on-demand specialists).

verification.frozen_historical_evidence: Historical log files at scripts/verify-pentagon-autonomy-from-logs.mjs lines 2166/2168/2201 retain the 2026-05-23 gpt-5.5/codex snapshot. These pin history and are NOT updated by cohort migration.
